body:
goodtransgirl:

So, my nesting partner got me some new black and pink gothy panties the other day. I considered making posts to show them off along with my small girl bulge inside, but then I noticed my yearning posts seem to get a lot more attention than my photos. So maybe more folks want to hear what’s in my head than get a peek at me. What do you think my friends?

What do you think?

Girl bulg
reblog_comment: It looks like the ayes have it. I’ll try and have it posted tomorrow morning.
